title: Wedding planner's fraud case postponed
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The fraud case against...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The fraud case against wedding planner Werner Gilroy has been postponed to 3 December.


> Gilroy appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Wednesday, 30 October, when the matter was postponed so that copies of the docket could be made.


He allegedly defrauded brides from throughout the country of thousands of rands, thought to total about R1 million, during 2020 and 2021.

Gilroy is from Mossel Bay and was the owner of the then Blue Lilies Wedding and Events company.

Previous articles:

- Wedding planner appears in court
- Wedding planner in court for fraud
- Wedding planner woes: Angry brides want their money back
